dishes.description: Slow-cooked bread, sweet tomatoes from the garden, basil oil, and a whisper of garlic. Simple and soulful.
Thinly sliced local swordfish, citrus, wild fennel, capers, and olive oil pressed last autumn.
Young fava beans, aged pecorino, mint, and a drizzle of our best extra virgin olive oil.
dishes.note: Only when the beans are perfect.

dishes.description: Handmade pasta, bitter greens, anchovy, chili, and toasted breadcrumbs. The taste of Puglia in every bite.
dishes.note: Maria's hands make the pasta fresh each morning.

dishes.description: Creamy Carnaroli rice, delicate zucchini flowers, saffron threads, and a final spoon of aged Parmigiano.

dishes.nameEn: Thin Egg Noodles with Rabbit Ragù
dishes.description: Silky handmade pasta, slow-simmered rabbit from the hills, tomato, rosemary, and a touch of orange zest.
Thin slices of beef wrapped around herbs, raisins, and pine nuts. Slow-cooked in rich tomato sauce until meltingly tender.
Fresh mussels from the Adriatic, baked with garlic, parsley, and a golden crust of seasoned breadcrumbs.
Soft, golden eggplant balls simmered in fresh tomato sauce, finished with basil and ricotta salata.
Warm almond cake with light ricotta cream. Served with wild strawberries or figs, depending on the day.
Silky cream, infused with Amalfi lemons and a whisper of vanilla. Topped with candied peel.
Twice-baked almond cookies to dip in a glass of sweet local wine. An invitation to linger.
dishes.note: The perfect end to every evening.
